---
title: "Charlotte Mary Yonge - The Miz Maze or The Winkworth Puzzle: A story in letters -- by nine authors: Charlotte Mary Yonge, Frances Awdry, Mary Bramston, Christabel Rose Coleridge, A.E. Mary Anderson Morshead, Frances Mary Peard, Mary Susanna Lee, Eleanor C. Price, and Florence Wilford"
slug: "willies_trouble"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


Who can help with the publication details for this booklet ?

*Willie's Trouble*and*Thomas Green's Adventure*are two short stories published together in small hardback booklet by Frederick Warne and Co of London and New York. The title page proclaims the volume to be "edited by the author of*The Heir of Redclyffe*", and to form part of the "Star of Hope" series. It has no date of publication, and there are no page numbers. There is a coloured frontispiece by an unidentified artist.

There is a handwritten dedication from "Edward George Hicks a present from Maude Dec 5th 1892"

*Willie's Trouble*has the following chapters:

*Thomas Green's Adventure*has no chapters.
